purpose: Replacement image generation manifest for preschool educational assets.

policy.realObjectStyle: animals, fruits, vegetables, and vehicles use realistic but cute studio flashcard images.
policy.abstractStyle: colors, shapes, letters, numbers, and icons use cute cartoon educational illustrations.
policy.format: Generate WebP files and keep square composition.
policy.safety: No scary, violent, dirty, branded, watermark, text clutter, or background distractions.
